name: Rice Krispies Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix sugar and syrup together in a saucepan. Bring to a boil until the sugar is dissolved.
2. Add peanut butter and Rice Krispies. Stir until combined.
3. Pour into a greased 9 x 13 inch pan and set aside.
TOPPING:
4. Melt chocolate chips and butterscotch chips over medium heat.
5. Pour topping over the mixture and let cool.
